description_long: This is a large residential house set within a fenced property, featuring a main building with multiple rooflines and attached structures. The house is surrounded by a driveway that leads to a detached garage and is lined with rows of evenly spaced trees, providing a landscaped approach. The main building appears to have two stories, with a prominent central entryway and symmetrical wings extending on either side. The roof is primarily gabled, with several intersecting sections and dormer-like projections. Windows are arranged in a balanced, symmetrical pattern, and the entryway is accentuated by a small porch with steps and possibly columns. The property is bordered by fencing and includes open yard space, giving it a suburban estate feel.
description: A large, two-story suburban house with a gabled roof, symmetrical wings, and a landscaped driveway lined with trees. The property includes a detached garage, fenced yard, and a prominent central entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical wings, and tree-lined driveway leading to the house.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the driveway, detached garage, and the arrangement of trees along the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, open yard, and the full extent of the fenced property.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the garage, side yard, and the alignment of trees along the fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, small porch, and possible columns, flanked by symmetrical landscaping.
